30.name: PSI Starstorm alpha

32.name: Lifeup alpha
32.note: psi arg 23: Lifeup alpha desc 'Restores 100 HP to one person'; existing content scales this to healHp 20.

40.name: Shield alpha
40.note: psi arg 31: Shield alpha desc 'reduces the damage caused by an enemy's attack by 50%' -> shielded.

41.name: Shield beta
41.note: psi arg 33: Shield beta desc 'Cuts damage in half' -> shielded.

44.name: PSI Shield alpha
44.note: psi arg 35: PSI Shield alpha desc 'blocks an enemy's PSI attack' -> shielded.

45.name: PSI Shield beta
45.note: psi arg 37: PSI Shield beta desc 'reflects an enemy's PSI attack' -> shielded.

47.name: PSI Shield omega
47.note: psi arg 38: PSI Shield omega desc 'Protects everyone with a psychic power shield' -> shielded.

50.name: Defense down alpha
50.note: psi arg 41: Defense down alpha desc 'Decreases the Defense of one enemy' -> defense -8.

52.name: Hypnosis alpha
52.note: psi arg 43: Hypnosis alpha desc 'Puts one enemy to sleep' -> asleep.

54.name: PSI Magnet alpha
54.note: psi arg 45: PSI Magnet alpha desc 'Grabs 2-8 points of PP' -> drainPp 5 midpoint.

56.name: Paralysis alpha
56.note: psi arg 47: Paralysis alpha desc 'numbed condition' -> paralyzed.

57.name: Paralysis omega
57.note: psi arg 48: Paralysis omega desc 'numbed condition' for all enemies -> paralyzed.

58.name: Brainshock alpha
58.note: psi arg 49: Brainshock alpha desc 'Makes one enemy feels strange' -> confused.

59.name: Brainshock omega
59.note: psi arg 50: Brainshock omega desc 'Makes all of the enemies feel strange' -> confused.

72.name: poison stinger
72.note: msg: 'stung with its poison stinger' -> poisoned.

80.name: sticky mucus
80.note: msg: 'spit out a sticky mucus' -> paralyzed.

82.name: spider silk
82.note: msg: 'shot spider silk out of its body' -> paralyzed.

96.name: lost temper
96.note: Code Address $c29e38 matches PSI Offense up alpha; msg 'lost his temper' -> offense +8.

202.name: electrical shock attack
202.note: Code Address $c2987d matches PSI Thunder beta; msg 'electrical shock attack' -> scaled 48 damage.

242.name: coil bind
242.note: msg: 'coiled around you and attacked' plus Code Address $c28cb8 shared with binding/sticky mucus/spider silk -> paralyzed.
